statements.notes: Shelf stable; Vegan; Gluten & Major Allergen Free; No Artificial Colorants; 3-in-1 prebiotic + probiotic + postbiotic synbiotic

ingredientRows.name: Probiotic Blend
ingredientRows.notes: 40 mg blend; 11 Billion CFU at expiration under recommended storage

ingredientRows.name: PreforPro
ingredientRows.notes: bacteriophage prebiotic blend: LH01 (Myoviridae), LL5 (Siphoviridae), T4D (Myoviridae), LL12 (Myoviridae); DV not established

ingredientRows.name: Tributyrin
ingredientRows.notes: as CoreBiome; tributyrin (butyrate postbiotic); DV not established

ingredients.name: Hypromellose
ingredients.notes: stomach acid-resistant outer vegan capsule + inner capsule

ingredients.name: Medium Chain Triglycerides
